title: Hiring an expert to set up our Monday.com template for interior design project management
excerpt:

posts.author: TNE-MODEL (Ann O'Shields)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi -
We are looking to hire someone to do our initial set up for project management of our model home interior design firm. We would need a template created to include job details, deliverables, deadlines, etc. that can also link to a calendar where we can see all of our model deadlines at once. Thanks in advance!

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TNE-MODEL

My name is Elena, we would love to help you! We’ve worked with several interior design companies both in Aus and NZ.

We are official monday channel partner in Aus and offer complimentary 1-hour discovery call where we can show you what we’ve done for others. The sets ups pretty similar to what you’ve described :).

Book a call here.

Some of our client case studies.

Elena Korolkova
Founder
Kick consulting

posts.author: Fruition (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Anne,

We’re a certified Monday.com partner and specialise in design and construction CRM and project management solutions and have a team locally based team in the US.

You can see more information and enquire through our website to book in a meeting/demo

Looking forward to sharing how we can help!

Josh
Director, fruition

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ann,

I’m happy to help you and think my broad experience with marketing firms can be very beneficial to tackle your challenges.

My expertise lies in automating as many processes as possible, so you can handle more clients simultaneously while keeping control over all projects.

I’ve made a demo environment for you to showcase what’s possible.

Feel free to schedule a call here so we can determine if it meets your needs.

Greetings,

Patrick

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @TNE-MODEL

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 6 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

We have a worked with many a client on your field, and your requirements are well within our field of expertise.

Please do schedule an initial Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @TNE-MODEL

We’re a recognized monday.com consulting company specialized in implementing project management and CRM solutions for design and construction firms.

With customizable project management templates available on monday.com, we can help you push your projects forward faster and drive efficiency. No matter the size or complexity of your interior design firm’s project, our consultants customize and set up templates in line with your business needs and remove needless friction. Also, they can ensure the successful integration of templates with calendar widgets and enable you to track and visualize project deadlines effectively.

You can gain more clarity by hiring dedicated monday.com consultants.
